subject: Prep note ahead of our quarterly review
body:
Dear Sheila,

Ahead of our quarterly sit-down next week I want to walk in with the numbers already trued up on my end, and there are a couple of small items I would like you to be ready on so we can spend the hour on the harder questions rather than the arithmetic.

Agenda from my side:
1. The portfolio total, walked holding by holding against the live positions feed. I have carried the figure I intend to defend, and I would like you to confirm the shared summary in the review folder against the live feed before we sit down so we are working from the same number, not one that was compiled a few trading days earlier.
2. Allocation drift against our target mix, along with the effective withdrawal figure I am carrying against the current balance, so we can talk about whether the withdrawal rate is still where we want it.
3. A short open item on one position where the second-source confirmation was thin. I have held an open verdict on it in my notes rather than committing to a number, and I would like your read.

On the household side I have completed a category-by-category reconciliation across my two ledgers and reconciled charitable giving across the three channels, so nothing there needs your time in the meeting.

Could you please verify the shared summary figure against the live feed before the meeting begins, and flag anything that has moved on your side that I would not see in the live feed. That way we can start from a single reconciled portfolio total.

Warm regards,
Clara Leon
